name: CAVU Resources Inc.
summary: CAVU Resources, Inc. operates in the information and entertainment space in the cannabis sector. It offers SoKu (Social Kush), a gamified social chat application for legal marijuana users; and MediKu (Medical Kush), a dosage tracking application for medical marijuana patients and caregivers providing personal analysis, budget managing recommendations, and costs and daily communication for result tracking. The company was formerly known as Proxity, Inc. and changed its name to CAVU Resources, Inc. in May 2009. CAVU Resources, Inc. was founded in 1995 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
